text: William is building KORA as a local-first AI system with continuity, inspectability, and real memory as first-class features.
KORA now has a manual memory write path.
William wants continuity to be first-class.
Decision: startup_context is canonical boot continuity. facts.jsonl is durable fact memory. ledger.jsonl is raw append-only history.
Decision: Claude-KORA bridge is live. Claude can now write notes and handoffs into KORA's inspectable memory. Context pull is working.
